refunds.method: Refunds are issued to the original form of payment.
refunds.timeline: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the phone is received and inspected at our facility.

returns.process: To initiate a return, log into your account and print a shipping label. Factory reset the phone before shipping.
returns.return_shipping_fee: Free return shipping for all mobile phones.
conditions: Mobile phones must be returned within 15 days of delivery.
Phones must be in their original, sealed packaging to avoid a restocking fee.
Opened phones incur a 15% restocking fee.
Phones with physical damage or liquid damage cannot be returned.
in_store_return_option: Online orders can be returned at brand stores only
exceptions: Refurbished or clearance phones are final sale and cannot be returned.

address_change_policy: Address can be changed before order is in processing. Cannot change once the order status is changed to Shipped or Delivered

warranties.exclusions: Warranties do NOT cover accidental damage (drops, cracked screens) or liquid damage unless an extended protection plan was purchased.
warranties.extended: Extended warranty (AppleCare+, Samsung Care+) must be purchased within 60 days of the original purchase date.
warranties.standard: All new mobile phones come with a standard 1-year manufacturer warranty covering hardware defects.

general_faq.trade_in: We offer trade-in programs for older iPhones and Samsung Galaxy devices. The value is credited to your new purchase.
general_faq.carrier_lock: All phones sold on our website are factory unlocked and compatible with all major carriers (AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile).
general_faq.customer_support: Customer support is available Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM IST.
general_faq.holiday_closure: Closed on national and major state holidays like Christmas, New Year, Ganesh Puja
general_faq.store_hours: Store hours is available Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM IST.
general_faq.payment_methods: We accept Visa, MasterCard, PayPal, and Apple Pay.
